18 Jun 2017

Mind bent. “Gravity corresponds to pure function-application, and the other fundamental forces correspond to side-effects.” —John Shutt

“We’re a country of immigrants — by and for them, too. Americans who don’t get it should get out.” —Bret Stephens

Wide Gamut Beach Ball is my new band name.

Registered for the Snohomish River Run half marathon in October. Price increases tomorrow. Perfect time to sign up and start training.

“What then must we, who believe in the free world, do?” —Daniel Fried

14 Jun 2017

“Trump is powerless to stop that — unless he arranges Mueller’s firing, hands out pardons like candy and thereby dooms his presidency anyway. This will not end well.” —Jennifer Rubin

14 Jun 2017

“The special counsel … is interviewing senior intelligence officials as part of a widening probe that now includes an examination of whether … Trump attempted to obstruct justice…” —WaPo

14 Jun 2017

With deep sadness, I can’t help but wonder if historians will consider the attack today the first shots of the second American civil war.

14 Jun 2017

A great relief to the 23 million whose health care you want to end, @speakerryan.

“We do not shed our humanity when we enter this chamber,” Mr. Ryan said… —NY Times

14 Jun 2017

Nice to let myself run fast again. It’s been too long.

14 Jun 2017

“To buoy his ego, they debase themselves, and what you heard them doing in that meeting wasn’t just swallowing their pride but choking on it.” —Frank Bruni

The amount of energy buzzing around @omnigroup in the week after WWDC is always fun, doubly so this year with Apple’s amazing improvements for productivity apps in iOS 11.

OMG this new iPad Pro with ProMotion is extraordinarily. Can’t stop scrolling back and forth between home screens.
